title: Can I set "event reminders" in Monday like in Google Calendar?

posts.author: NorthernBuilding (Bill Arwas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’d like to be able to set reminds for certain items that have an hour and a status.

For example, “meeting at this place” would have a status of meeting and an hour of 4:30pm. Is it possible to set up notifications that notify me 2 hours before the event only if the item’s status is meeting?

In the automations centre it seems I can only set up reminders at the same time every day which are not much use for meeting that occur at different times.

Thanks
